subtitle: Set up your profile in a few easy steps
safeguarding_subtitle: Let us know if you'd like additional support
safeguarding_intro: Your safety matters to us. If you consider yourself a vulnerable adult, or if you would like additional support when using this community, please let us know below. Our coordinators can arrange safeguarded exchanges, mediate contact on your behalf, and ensure you are matched with appropriately vetted members. Your responses are confidential and only visible to community coordinators — never on your public profile.
safeguarding_gdpr_notice: This information is classified as sensitive personal data. We collect it solely to ensure your safety during community exchanges. Your selections are stored with a consent record and can be changed at any time from your settings. Only community coordinators and administrators can view your responses.
welcome_description: Let's set up your profile so you can start connecting with your community and exchanging time credits.
benefit_earn_desc: Help others and earn credits you can spend on services you need
benefit_community_desc: Connect with neighbours and strengthen local bonds
benefit_skills_desc: Offer your talents and discover what your community can do
profile_description: Add a photo and tell the community about yourself. This helps members recognise and trust you.
photo_drag_hint: or drag and drop — JPG, PNG or GIF, max 5 MB
bio_placeholder: Tell the community about yourself — your interests, skills, or what you hope to get from timebanking...
interests_description: Select categories that interest you. This helps us personalise your experience and suggest relevant listings.
no_categories_available: No categories available yet. You can skip this step and set your interests later in Settings.
no_categories_skip: No categories available. You can skip this step.
select_or_skip: Select one or more, or skip this step
skills_offer_description: Select skills you can offer to others. We'll create listings for you.
skills_need_description: Select categories you need help with. We'll create request listings for you.
toast_invalid_file_type_desc: Please upload an image file (JPG, PNG or GIF).
toast_file_too_large_desc: Please upload an image smaller than 5 MB.
toast_upload_failed_desc: Failed to upload photo. Please try again.
toast_photo_required_desc: Please upload a profile photo to continue.
toast_bio_required_desc: Please write at least {{min}} characters about yourself.
toast_save_failed_desc: Failed to save your bio. Please try again.
toast_something_went_wrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

safeguarding.empty: No safeguarding options have been configured for this community.

confirmation.title: Your safeguarding preferences have been saved
confirmation.intro: Thank you for sharing this. Here is a summary of what you chose, who can see it, and what activates as a result.
confirmation.no_selections: You did not select any safeguarding options.
confirmation.who_can_see_body: Only the community coordinators and administrators can see these preferences. Other members cannot. All access is logged.
confirmation.activation_broker_review: A coordinator will review messages you send and receive.
confirmation.activation_match_approval: A coordinator will approve matches involving you before they are suggested to the other member.
confirmation.activation_discovery_hidden: You will be hidden from discovery for members who have not completed the required vetting.
confirmation.activation_notification: A coordinator has been notified and will be in touch to discuss how we can help.
confirmation.activation_none: No automatic protections activate from these selections. Your preferences are recorded for coordinator awareness.
confirmation.revoke_heading: How to change or revoke these at any time
confirmation.revoke_body: You can review or revoke any of these preferences any time from your profile settings. You do not need to ask an administrator to do this.
confirmation.declination_intro: Thank you for reviewing these options. Your response has been saved so coordinators know you have seen and considered this step.
